summary: Approved: [ART-CHARTER] goal—enzyme activity prediction; protein structure generation is a non-goal. [ART-DATA] EnzymeBench v3 snapshot EBV3-7A91; family-disjoint split. [ART-METRIC] primary macro AUROC, statistical unit protein family; success is family-level. [ART-SEEDS] formal seeds 7, 21, 42; retain failed formal seeds. [ART-BASELINE] ESM2-linear at commit c0ffee, bound to configuration. [ART-GOVERNANCE] 24 GPU-hours on 2xA100; protect data/raw; stop at budget exhaustion or >2 NaN failures. Deprecated/rejected: EnzymeBench v2, temporary CSV, seed 13/42-only, micro F1, accuracy, per-protein averaging, 0.75 threshold, ESM2-MLP, random forest, molecule generation, docking, 80 GPU-hours/8xH100, and deleting failed runs ([ART-REJECTED-METRIC], [ART-REJECTED-SEEDS], [ART-REJECTED-COMPUTE], [ART-REJECTED-SCOPE]).
